part_1_site_details.description_of_subdivision_certificate: Application for a Torrens Title subdivision certificate to create two residential lots from an existing single lot containing one detached dwelling at 18 Ocean View Road, Freshwater. The existing dwelling is to be retained on proposed Lot 12A, with minor boundary realignment to provide compliant setbacks, private open space, and vehicle access. A new vacant lot (proposed Lot 12B) is to be created at the rear of the property for a future two-storey dwelling house, consistent with the approved Development Consent DA2023/0587 issued by Northern Beaches Council on 2023-11-14. The works associated with the subdivision include construction of a new concrete driveway and shared access handle along the eastern side boundary, provision of separate utility connections (water, sewer, electricity, NBN) to the rear lot, stormwater drainage upgrades including an on-site detention system, and installation of new boundary fencing and landscaping to clearly delineate the two lots. The purpose of this subdivision certificate is to enable registration of the final plan of subdivision with NSW Land Registry Services following completion of all conditions of consent relating to subdivision, servicing, access, and drainage, and to allow the sale or separate financing of the newly created rear lot while retaining the existing family home at the front.
part_1_site_details.lots_to_be_created_if_applicable: Two Torrens Title lots to be created from existing Lot 12 in DP 1245893: Proposed Lot 12A (front lot) approximately 452.3 m² containing the existing dwelling and associated garage, private open space, and upgraded driveway crossover; and Proposed Lot 12B (rear battle-axe lot) approximately 398.7 m² to be created as a vacant residential lot with shared access handle along the eastern boundary, separate services, and building envelope as per approved subdivision plans prepared by Coastal Land Surveyors dated 2023-09-28 (Plan Ref: CLS-18OVR-02).
